title: Device Home Screen - Device images
scenario: Verify device images display correctly on the home screen: properly loaded when paired and connected, and greyed out when the device is turned off.
steps: Pair a device and connect it to the internet.
Observe the device image on the home screen.
Observe the device image on the home screen again.
expected: When the device is paired and connected to the internet, the device image loads properly. When the device is turned off, the image is still displayed but greyed out.
